history.content:
<thought>
I am at position (6,3) facing north. The goal O is located at (4,5). The cell directly in front of me (5,3) is floor, and the path ahead appears clear to (4,3) which is also floor. From there, I can turn right and move east to reach the goal. Moving forward now is safe and progresses towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly in front (north) is a floor cell (.) and is safe. The goal O is located to the north-east, but moving east is blocked by lava. So moving forward is the best immediate action to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is located two cells to my right (east). The cell directly in front of me is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to turn clockwise to face east, then I can move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
The goal O is directly above my position, two cells ahead. The cell immediately in front of me is a floor cell (.), so I can move forward safely toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at (6,3) facing up. The cell directly ahead (5,3) is the goal 'O'. There are no obstacles in the way, so moving forward will reach the goal immediately.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
